keyEvents.text: Goal!  Jamaica 0, Haiti 1. Louicius Deedson (Haiti) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alex Christian with a headed pass.
Goal!  Jamaica 0, Haiti 2. Louicius Deedson (Haiti) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mondy Prunier   following a fast break.
Carl Sainté (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Jamaica 0, Haiti 2.
Second Half begins Jamaica 0, Haiti 2.
Own Goal by Ricardo Adé, Haiti.  Jamaica 1, Haiti 2.
Djimy Alexis (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Haiti. Shanyder Borgelin replaces Louicius Deedson.
Substitution, Jamaica. Dujuan Richards replaces Demarai Gray.
Substitution, Jamaica. Di'Shon Bernard replaces Damion Lowe.
Substitution, Jamaica. Daniel Johnson replaces Joel Latibeaudiere.
Substitution, Jamaica. Romario Williams replaces Shamar Nicholson.
Danley Jean-Jacques (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ricardo Adé (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Goal!  Jamaica 2, Haiti 2. Bobby De Cordova-Reid (Jamaica) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Di'Shon Bernard (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. François Dulysse replaces Danley Jean-Jacques.
Second yellow card to Djimy Alexis (Haiti) for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Roberto Louima replaces Jeppe Simonsen.
Substitution, Haiti. Carnejy Antoine replaces Mondy Prunier.
Daniel Johnson (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Jamaica 2, Haiti 2.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
